citation: Denis Peskoff, Joe Barrow, Christopher Vu, and Diag Davenport. "Freeing the Law with LOCUS: A Local Ordinance Corpus for the United States." arXiv:2606.19334, 2026.
grok_note: This pack provides 8 filter-aware prompts titled Current view, CA focus, Other topic, Rules function, Tier 1 tier, Audit signals, Selected unit, Local package from dataset main. Apply filters to explore aggregates. GitHub Pages does not make live model calls. Raw ordinance text and source locators are not published.

prompts.detail: Use active filters and denominators before interpreting color.
prompts.question: What does the current filtered map view show?
safety_notes: Aggregate-only public artifact.
No ordinance text, headers, raw rows, source locator values, or review events.
Model labels and scores are review aids, not legal findings.
prompts.title: Current view

prompts.detail: Applies the highest-count published state filter from the aggregate layer.

Model labels and scores are review aids, not legal findings.
